narrative:
German Township has 2,685 registered voters, with 47.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 45.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 6.7%, a pronounced Republican lean of 38.7 percentage points.
